data.name: InvalidAccountZoneOrSensorCode
data.value: The account, zone, or sensor code is invalid.

data.name: ValidAccountIdRequired
data.value: A valid account id is required.

data.name: ValidZoneIdRequired
data.value: A valid zone id is required.

data.name: SelectedZoneDoesNotBelongToAccount
data.value: The selected zone does not belong to this account.

data.name: SensorCodeAlreadyExists
data.value: A sensor with the same code already exists.

data.name: NoActiveSubscription
data.value: The account does not have an active subscription.

data.name: SensorPlanLimitReached
data.value: Plan limit reached. Your current plan allows up to {0} sensors.
